hero.heading: Plans that grow
hero.subtitle: No lock-in contracts. Scale as your operation grows. Start small, think big.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For small teams looking to start automating.

plans.name: Business
plans.description: For scaled operations that need full power.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For large operations with compliance and security requirements.

disclaimer: Pricing on request. Plans can be customized to your needs. Contact us for a personalized proposal.

items.question: Is there a minimum contract period?
items.answer: No. Our plans are monthly and you can cancel anytime without penalty. For annual plans, we offer a special discount.

items.question: What counts as a 'conversation'?
items.answer: A conversation is a message exchange session between your WhatsApp number and a contact within a 24-hour window. Multiple messages in the same window count as a single conversation.

items.question: Can I change plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect on the next billing cycle.

items.question: Are there additional costs for WhatsApp Cloud API?
items.answer: Catalisa does not charge for Cloud API usage itself. However, Meta charges per business-initiated conversation (per Meta's official pricing). User-initiated conversations are free for the first 1,000/month.

items.question: Can I try before committing?
items.answer: Yes. We offer a complete, personalized demo. Schedule a demo with our team to see the platform working with your real use case.

items.question: How does support work?
items.answer: Starter: email support during business hours. Business: priority support with response SLA. Enterprise: 24/7 support with dedicated account manager.
